nasb.text: But let all who take refuge in You be glad, Let them ever sing for joy; And may You shelter them, That those who love Your name may exult in You.

esv.text: But let all who take refuge in you rejoice; let them ever sing for joy, and spread your protection over them, that those who love your name may exult in you.

cnv.text: 願所有投靠你的人都喜樂， 常常歡呼； 願你保護他們， 又願愛你名的人，因你歡樂。

ccb.text: 愿投靠你的人欢歌不断。 求你庇护他们， 让爱你的人因你而喜乐。

csbs.text: 愿所有投靠你的都欢喜， 永远欢呼； 愿你庇护他们， 让那些爱你名的人因你欢庆；
